name: Review Working Tree
when_to_use: Another agent changed files and the user wants cursor-agent to review uncommitted work

name: Review Branch Diff
when_to_use: The user wants cursor-agent to review committed branch changes against a base ref

name: Second Opinion
when_to_use: The user wants cursor-agent to analyze a decision, bug, plan, or architecture, optionally under a different model such as gpt-5 or sonnet-4

name: Prepare Prompt Only
when_to_use: The user wants a safe cursor-agent prompt or command without invoking the CLI yet

name: Diagnose Cursor Setup
when_to_use: cursor-agent auth, workspace trust, model availability, or runtime health is unclear
